1011001.desc: It may be a simple cleaning job, but I'll still give it 200% of my energy!
1011001.name: Limitless Energy!

1020501.desc: A deeply clear blue that radiates gentle grace. There's an oceanic depth concealed in her service-oriented attitude and quiet smile.
1020501.name: Azure Heart

1051701.desc: A fresh, practical ensemble perfect for everyday life. One look at her and you can tell – she's ready to have a great day out with you.
1051701.name: Daily Steps

1070301.desc: Cute and energetic. She carries behind her a backpack full of sweet little secrets, sealing them away with an innocent giggle upon the wind.
1070301.name: Canvas Day

2060301.desc: Like a pure, bright star plucked from the night sky, every little detail glimmers with the light of hope.
2060301.name: Dreamy Starlight

2990301.desc: She carries with her the sweet aroma and the electrifying freshness of the sea breeze. Whose heart has she stricken with her cuteness today?
2990301.name: Seaspray Leisure

3031201.desc: Tea isn't the only thing I'm serving you – there's also my sweet care and the courtesy hidden in my smile.
3031201.name: Lovingly Sweet Tea Time

3040701.desc: A golden-yellow fledgling basking beneath the soft sunlight. It warbles a fairytale melody of sweet candy and seashells.
3040701.name: Fledgling's Fairytale

3120101.desc: Beneath the neatly tucked collar of her sailor uniform is a sly, mischievous smile, her black skirt fluttering like the playful waves at night. Beware, for this "mysterious merchant" has opened up shop at school.
3120101.name: Night of the Empty Bell

4030301.desc: She calls it "special hospitality" with a touch of playful elegance. What heart-throbbing amusement is she planning?
4030301.name: Lazy Service

4990201.desc: Majesty and grace join in perfect unison, fulfilling the supreme contract known as service with an elegant demeanor.
4990201.name: Elegant Affection

5060101.desc: Step away from the chessboard for a moment and pick up the teapot. As the steam rises around you both, she delivers a warm kind of wisdom that sees through the human heart.
5060101.name: Planning Comes Later

99000101.desc: 全副武装，准备出发！今日又要在上学路中做什么恶作剧呢~
99000101.name: 元气上学路

99000102.desc: 笔挺的学院制服，优等生的气场下，依旧是那带着狡黠与挑衅的神情~
99000102.name: 优等生气场

99000201.desc: 懵懵懂懂地探索周遭，对每样事物都报以最直接而稚嫩的触碰。
99000201.name: 懵懂时光

99000202.desc: 漂亮整洁的连衣裙下，是她安安静静观察世界的专注视线。
99000202.name: 见习观察员

99000301.desc: 一身毫无杂质的纯白，仿佛是她安静性格最直接的延伸。
99000301.name: 纯白低语

99000302.desc: 一身正式的背带裙礼装，穿在她身上却依旧透着股怯生生的可爱。
99000302.name: 沉静礼装
